name: Neuroendocrine and Systemic Signal Reset Coverage Assessment

assessment_window.basis: Delta surveillance from the published baseline event through the current surveillance pass.

summary: Coverage is enough to support the current low-confidence human_biomarker_signal public baseline, but it is still thin as a coverage map. The public support map anchors the stage to TRIIM's small uncontrolled human biomarker signal and includes animal or nonhuman-primate plausibility from hypothalamic NF-kappaB/GnRH, hypothalamic stem-cell exosomes, oxytocin, and klotho. The surveillance pass found no public-update result, but it surfaced close not-yet-curated S1PC/eNAMPT aged-mouse plus human-biomarker context and recruiting klotho gene-therapy registries with no posted results. Those source-completeness questions should be handled as coverage repair before another ordinary surveillance pass.

evidence_categories.rationale: TRIIM anchors the public human_biomarker_signal stage, and TRIIM-X is captured as a randomized no-results registry. Human interventional coverage remains thin because TRIIM is a nine-participant uncontrolled male pilot, TRIIM-X still has no results, and close klotho gene-therapy registries have not yet been curated as trial-watch or excluded records.
evidence_categories.gap_note: NCT07216781 and NCT07285629 should be evaluated during coverage repair.

evidence_categories.rationale: The current public claim is intervention-stage and does not rely on observational or natural-experiment evidence.
evidence_categories.gap_note: Observational endocrine or circulating-factor associations may provide context but should not upgrade the intervention stage.

evidence_categories.rationale: The support map includes central hypothalamic lifespan and aging-phenotype studies, hypothalamic stem-cell exosome aging studies, systemic oxytocin aged-muscle regeneration, and aged-rhesus klotho cognition.
evidence_categories.gap_note: PMID 42102814 adds close aged-mouse systemic signaling context but is not yet curated.

evidence_categories.rationale: The baseline covers endocrine combination therapy, hypothalamic inflammatory-neuroendocrine signaling, hypothalamic secretory exosomes, systemic oxytocin, and klotho protein signaling.
evidence_categories.gap_note: The adipose eNAMPT to hypothalamus mechanism from PMID 42102814 should be assessed during coverage repair.

evidence_categories.rationale: The outlook and reviews explicitly record the limiting points: TRIIM is small and uncontrolled, TRIIM-X has no posted results, the modalities are heterogeneous, and none of the animal or NHP signals proves durable human function.
evidence_categories.gap_note: There is no definitive negative randomized human result yet.

evidence_categories.rationale: Safety coverage is thin because the track spans recombinant growth hormone combinations, DHEA/metformin, hypothalamic or reproductive-axis signaling, oxytocin, klotho protein, and possible gene-therapy delivery, with little durable human safety evidence.
evidence_categories.gap_note: The new klotho gene-therapy registries make safety/durability coverage more important, but they have no results.

evidence_categories.rationale: TRIIM-X is captured and rechecked, but surveillance surfaced NCT07216781 and NCT07285629 as close recruiting klotho gene-therapy registries with no results. They are not yet represented publicly or as formal exclusions.
evidence_categories.gap_note: Coverage repair should decide how to represent or exclude the klotho gene-therapy registries.

evidence_categories.rationale: Surveillance checked one broad 2026 aging-modulation review that mentions TRIIM-style modulation, but no recent systematic review or focused review triangulation is recorded for this heterogeneous track.
evidence_categories.gap_note: Coverage repair should check recent review context only enough to catch missing primary anchors or limiting evidence.

evidence_categories.rationale: Major anchors for TRIIM, hypothalamic NF-kappaB/GnRH, hypothalamic stem-cell exosomes, klotho NHP cognition, and oxytocin aged muscle are represented, but the surveillance pass found a close eNAMPT/S1PC systemic-signaling source that is not yet adjudicated.
evidence_categories.gap_note: Coverage repair should adjudicate whether PMID 42102814 is a public anchor, cross-track context, or exclusion.

evidence_categories.rationale: The outlook already bounds overlap with DNA methylation, nutrient sensing, niche support, circulating factors, and inflammation. The S1PC/eNAMPT and klotho gene-therapy items reinforce the need to keep systemic-signal claims separate from NAD, metabolite, circulating-factor, and gene-therapy tracks.
evidence_categories.gap_note: Future public updates should avoid inheriting evidence from adjacent mechanisms without explicit attribution.

search_log_summary: Delta surveillance checked PubMed same-window searches, TRIIM-X PubMed/title searches, direct NCT04375657 status, broader ClinicalTrials.gov TRIIM/thymus/epigenetic-age searches, klotho/oxytocin/GnRH registry searches, and S1PC/eNAMPT PubMed and registry searches. No public-update result was found, but S1PC/eNAMPT and klotho gene-therapy trial-watch records warrant coverage repair.
source_selection_notes: PMID 42102814 was excluded from this surveillance pass as context-only because it does not provide randomized human functional evidence, but it is close enough to require coverage-repair adjudication.
NCT07216781 and NCT07285629 were excluded from public records for now because they are recruiting or early no-results klotho gene-therapy registries.
NCT04375657 remains public no-results context and should continue to be watched.
PMID 42230502 was excluded as animal hypothalamic/HPA biomarker context that does not change the track baseline.
PMID 41994361 was excluded as a broad review rather than a primary result source.

known_gaps.description: TRIIM-X remains recruiting with no posted results despite a stale estimated completion date, so the main human follow-up signal is still unresolved.
known_gaps.suggested_action: Recheck NCT04375657 and PubMed during coverage repair and subsequent surveillance.

known_gaps.description: PMID 42102814 adds close S1PC/eNAMPT adipose-hypothalamic signaling evidence with aged-mouse function and human circulating-biomarker context, but it is not represented publicly or as a formal exclusion.
known_gaps.suggested_action: Run coverage repair to decide whether PMID 42102814 should be staged as a public source/study/finding, assigned to an adjacent track, or recorded as explicit context-only exclusion.

known_gaps.description: NCT07216781 and NCT07285629 are recruiting or early no-results klotho plasmid gene-therapy registries close to the klotho branch, but they are not curated as trial-watch or exclusion records.
known_gaps.suggested_action: During coverage repair, decide whether these registries warrant public trial-watch context or explicit excluded-source notes.

known_gaps.description: No reviewed intervention shows randomized human functional, intrinsic-capacity, disease, durability, mortality, or LEV-relevant benefit from a defined neuroendocrine or systemic-signal reset modality.
known_gaps.suggested_action: Do not upgrade beyond human_biomarker_signal until controlled human functional or durable clinical outcomes appear.

known_gaps.description: Growth hormone combinations, DHEA/metformin, hypothalamic manipulation, GnRH, oxytocin, klotho protein, and gene-therapy delivery each have different preventive-use safety and durability constraints.
known_gaps.suggested_action: Require modality-specific safety, dosing, durability, and active-component evidence before increasing confidence.

known_gaps.description: No focused recent-review or citation-network audit is recorded for this heterogeneous track.
known_gaps.suggested_action: Use coverage repair to check review-level triangulation only as needed to catch missing primary anchors and limiting evidence.

known_gaps.description: S1PC/eNAMPT, klotho, TRIIM, oxytocin, and hypothalamic interventions overlap NAD/redox, metabolite restoration, circulating factors, niche support, DNA methylation, nutrient sensing, and gene-therapy framing.
known_gaps.suggested_action: Keep future public changes explicit about which evidence supports neuroendocrine/systemic signal reset itself versus adjacent mechanisms.

next_coverage_action: Run a bounded coverage-repair pass focused on PMID 42102814, NCT07216781, NCT07285629, and brief recent-review triangulation before ordinary surveillance resumes.
